title: Moderation Update: Recent High-Severity Reports
body:
We’ve completed a review of several recent high-severity community reports:

- User spam_wave_42 has been permanently banned for posting phishing links across multiple channels (report_001).
- User toxic_runner has received a formal warning for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers (report_002).
- A mass report against a core maintainer (report_006) was reviewed and determined to be a false positive driven by brigading; no action has been taken against the maintainer. Coordinated false or bad-faith reporting is itself a violation of our guidelines, and implicated accounts have been warned.

As a reminder: phishing, harassment, and coordinated abuse of the reporting tools are not tolerated. If you see something concerning, please continue to use the report function—our team reviews each high-severity report and takes action based on the evidence and our community guidelines.
